def positive_zip_range_len_used_instead_of_enumerate():
    rule_id = "zip_range_len_used_instead_of_enumerate"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "zip(range(len(x)), x) pattern used; replace with enumerate(x)."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
